perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a grey newsboy cap and glasses faces the camera, gesturing with his index finger while speaking excitedly. He holds up an iPhone. (2) The camera zooms in on his face as he looks surprised, then he holds up a white foldable device (gimbal) and unfolds it. (3) He demonstrates the magnetic attachment of the iPhone to the gimbal, rotating the device to show vertical and horizontal orientations. The final shot displays a close-up of the iPhone screen showing a teleprompter interface.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy electronic background music begins immediately with a male voice speaking Mandarin in an enthusiastic, fast-paced tone. (2) As the man performs the action of attaching the phone, a distinct 'click' or 'snap' sound effect is heard, synced with the visual. (3) The music maintains a constant upbeat rhythm throughout as the male narrator continues his instructional commentary until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Hook: '跟你說 一秒用iPhone變成穩定器' (Tell you, turn iPhone into a stabilizer in one second) appearing at the start. (2) Emotive Caption: '什麼!!?' (What!!?) in a blue box to emphasize surprise. (3) Product Name: 'Insta360 Flow 2 Pro' in a cyan box. (4) Functional Steps: '第一步 展開' (Step 1 Unfold) and '第二步 把你的iPhone直接給它 啪 上去' (Step 2 Put your iPhone directly on it with a 'Pa' sound). (5) Functional Description: '可以拍直的 也可以拍橫的' (Can shoot vertically, can also shoot horizontally). (6) Final Hook: '而且裡面還有提詞機哦!' (And there's even a teleprompter inside!).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Product Reveal -> Step-by-step Demo -> Key Feature Highlight

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the product.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged man wearing a grey newsboy cap, circular glasses, a light grey T-shirt with 'ROOTS ATHLETICS' logo, and a yellow digital watch.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A light purple or lavender colored wall with some vertical paneling and a hint of office furniture in the blurred background.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a concise product demonstration and endorsement for the Insta360 Flow 2 Pro. It aims to capture viewer attention with a 'one-second' hook, prove the product's value through a quick physical demonstration of its magnetic mounting and stabilization capabilities, and finalize the appeal by highlighting a software feature (teleprompter).

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct presentation of the product name on screen and verbal recommendation of its features.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Host's signature newsboy cap and rapid-fire Mandarin tech delivery.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes high-frequency text overlays and sound effects typical of short-form social media content (TikTok/Reels style) to maintain high viewer retention.
